articles.title: More Woes For XRP As MoneyGram Suspends Trading On Ripple’s Platform
articles.description: The United States Securities and Exchange Commission has a long and complex history with the cryptocurrency industry. This has included the prosecution of fraudulent Initial Coin Offerings during the ICO boom a few years ago, the back and forth of the Bitcoin ETF, and the issues surrounding the introduction of crypto-related regulation. The latest of […]

articles.title: MoneyGram suspends trading on Ripple, citing SEC lawsuit
articles.description: "Due to the uncertainty concerning their ongoing litigation with the SEC, the company has suspended trading on Ripple's platform," says MoneyGram's quarterly outlook.

articles.title: MoneyGram suspends partnership with Ripple
articles.description: In the wake of the ongoing lawsuit between Ripple and United States Securities Exchange Commission (SEC), MoneyGram decided to suspend trading on Ripple’s platform. The company cited “uncertainty” concerning the ongoing litigation and stated: Due to the uncertainty concerning their ongoing litigation with the SEC, the Company has suspended trading on Ripple’s platform. As part […]

articles.title: The Dark Side of Ethereum
articles.description: For the last six years, Ethereum has dominated the smart contract landscape and has been arguably the only viable platform for launching decentralized applications (dApps) — due to its sizeable developer community and first-mover advantage. But in the last year, Ethereum’s limitations have begun to show, leading to an exodus of sorts among its once fervent developer community. Here, we take a...

articles.title: MoneyGram Says It ‘Has Suspended Trading on Ripple’s Platform’
articles.description: On Monday (February 22), MoneyGram International, Inc. (NASDAQ: MGI), made an important announcement regarding its partnership with Ripple Labs. Californian FinTech company Ripple announced on 17 June 2019 that it entered into a strategic partnership with MoneyGram, one of the world’s largest money transfer companies. articles.title: 3 reasons why Fantom (FTM) price continues to rally to new all-time highs
articles.description: In the past month, Fantom price increased 1,570% as governance features and a cross-chain bridge to Ethereum strengthen its DeFi aspirations.

articles.title: Ethereum Fees Shoot Above $30 Amid Sudden Market Dip
articles.description: Average Ethereum (ETH) transaction fees have surged to new highs as the crypto market takes a dive.

articles.title: XRP in the Green Ahead of Ripple's First Pretrial Conference with SEC
articles.description: XRP remains the only cryptocurrency in the green on cusp of Ripple's first pretrial conference with the SEC

articles.title: Ethereum mining’s monthly revenue reaches all time high over $1 billion in February
articles.description: Data collected by The Block Research shows that, for the first time, Ethereum miners have brought in more than $1 billion in revenue for the month of February.

articles.title: $1.5 Billion Liquidated as Bitcoin Price Plunges $5000 In Hours
articles.description: Bitcoin lost around $5,000 of its dollar value today. This brought the entire market down and resulted in around $1.5 billion in liquidations.

articles.title: 70 Billion CRO Burned Ahead of Crypto.org Chain Launch, Price Soars 70%
articles.description: The launch date for the Crypto.org Chain has been announced, with a major token burn scheduled today. Crypto.org Chain Launch Looming Crypto.org Chain will launch on mainnet on March 25, the Crypto.com team has announced. Envisioned as an open-source settlement layer for payments, DeFi and NFTs, the network hopes to provide high speed and low transaction fees for its users....

articles.title: Did $50K 'trigger' Peter Schiff to buy BTC? 5 Things to watch in Bitcoin this week
articles.description: As Bitcoin wobbles following a spurt to above $58,000, concerns mount about the depth of a possible inbound correction.

articles.title: Rocker Gene Simmons Announces $300,000 Investment in Cardano (ADA)
articles.description: Gene Simmons, the iconic bass player of the popular rock bank Kiss, has announced he has invested $300,000 into Cardano (ADA), shortly after announcing positions in other cryptocurrencies including BTC, ETH, and DOGE. On social media, Simmons published a tweet announcing his investment and warning his 938,000 followers that he is not a financial analyst […]
